summary: Iteration 2 testing of Norton store additions (20 products, box_variant SVGs, coupons WELCOME10/SAVE20/FLASH70, offer banner, orders w/ coupon). Backend: 15/15 pytest cases passed. Frontend: banner+countdown+close, 20 product cards (all requested slugs present), product-detail for norton-360-with-lifelock-ultimate-plus (name/price $159.99/SVG box), cart coupon apply/discount/remove, checkout with coupon-adjusted total, order-success and DB order shows coupon_code='WELCOME10' and discount_amount=16.0.
passed_backend: All 10 NEW slugs present (antitrack, identity-advisor-plus, lifelock select/select-plus/advantage/ultimate-plus, 360-deluxe-advantage, ultimate-help-desk, genie-scam-detector, vpn)
POST /api/orders with WELCOME10 → order.subtotal, discount_amount>0, coupon_code='WELCOME10', total=subtotal-discount
POST /api/orders with INVALID coupon → order created, discount_amount=0
POST /api/orders with SAVE20 & subtotal<80 → order created, discount_amount=0
GET /api/banner (public) → title, coupon_code='FLASH70', is_active=true, expires_at set
POST /api/admin/coupons uppercases code; duplicate returns 400; PATCH is_active=false makes public validate return 404; DELETE succeeds
PATCH /api/admin/banner updates title reflected in GET /api/banner
passed_frontend: offer-banner visible at top with MEGA SAVINGS EVENT title, FLASH70 code, offer-countdown timer
/products shows 20 cards; testids for antitrack, lifelock-select, identity-advisor-plus, vpn, ultimate-help-desk all present
/product/norton-360-with-lifelock-ultimate-plus: product-name='Norton 360 with LifeLock Ultimate Plus', product-price='$159.99', SVG product-box-<slug> rendered
Cart: cart-coupon-input + apply with WELCOME10 shows cart-coupon-applied, cart-discount=-$16.00, cart-total $159.99→$143.99; remove restores to $159.99
Checkout retains coupon (checkout-total $143.99); simulate-btn creates order
Order-success page shows order number BIK-20260708-11A552
Backend verification: order has coupon_code='WELCOME10' and discount_amount=16.0
critical_code_review_comments: server.py at 972 lines is approaching the 700-line split threshold — consider extracting coupons/banner/admin modules for future maintainability.
Prior iteration_1 issue (admin-deliver on non-paid order returning 200 instead of 400) was noted as fixed but not re-tested in this iteration; unchanged by new features.
seed_data_creation: Test orders created with customer_email TEST_coupon@example.com and TEST_buyer/x/y@e.com; admin coupon TEST10 create/delete cycle self-cleans.
mocked_apis_note: PayPal and Resend still in MOCK mode as documented; not re-verified beyond simulate-payment happy path.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new endpoints and UI wiring for coupons/banner/box_variant are green. If reseeding again, verify FLASH70 banner + 3 default coupons repopulate via SEED_VERSION bump.
